word: G1749 - ἔνεδρον - énedron - en'-ed-ron - Lying in wait

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἔνεδρον

- Transliteration: Enedron

- Phonetic: en'-ed-ron

- Definition:

1. a lying in wait for, an ambush

- Origin: from the same as G1747

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: Neuter of the same as G1747; an ambush that is (figuratively) murderous design: - lying in wait.
